message:
feat(async): fcp-async-core abstraction crate + ASUPERSYNC tokio migration

Introduce fcp-async-core as the shared runtime abstraction layer for the
ASUPERSYNC program, replacing direct tokio API usage across the workspace.

New crate: crates/fcp-async-core
- Re-exports runtime primitives (time, sync, channel, io, net, process, task)
- Provides runtime::main, runtime::test, runtime::block_on_sync macros
- select! macro forwarding
- Single point of control for future runtime substrate swaps

Migration across 6 crates (tokio → fcp-async-core):
- fcp-host: bin entrypoint (#[tokio::main] → #[fcp_async_core::runtime::main]),
  TcpListener, process spawning, Mutex, BufReader, task::spawn; all async
  tests migrated to #[fcp_async_core::runtime::test]
- fcp-sdk: runtime.rs block_on_sync() replaces manual Handle::try_current()
  + fallback runtime builder; StreamingConnection JoinHandle type; supervisor
  select!/sleep/interval/watch channel migration; all async tests migrated
- fcp-streaming: reconnect + stream test attributes migrated
- openai connector: retry sleep calls → fcp_async_core::time::sleep
- fcp-host/budget: async test attribute migrated
- fcp-host/discovery: 10 async test attributes migrated

Workspace Cargo.toml: add fcp-async-core to members + default-members + deps

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
